description: You are a financial planning analyst. Using the sales history data at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_performance_2yr.csv, build a year-over-year performance dashboard in Power BI Desktop. Create a calculated date table named 'Calendar' covering the years 2023 and 2024, with columns for Year, Quarter (formatted as "Q1", "Q2", etc.), and MonthNum. Establish a relationship between Calendar[Date] and the sales table's Date column, and mark the Calendar table as a date table. Define three DAX measures: Total_Revenue (sum of Revenue), PY_Revenue (total revenue for the same period in the prior year), and YoY_Growth (year-over-year percentage change). On a report page named "YoY Analysis", create a Clustered Column Chart showing Total_Revenue by Region with Year as the legend, a Line Chart showing Total_Revenue by MonthNum with Year as the legend, a Matrix with Region as rows and Product_Category as columns showing YoY_Growth as values with background color conditional formatting (red for negative growth, green for positive growth), and a Card displaying the overall YoY_Growth formatted as a percentage. Save the report as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\YoY_Performance.pbix.
